name: claude-code-best
description: Claude Code Best CLI — pkg packaging config (standalone, does not modify root package.json)
_comment_targets: Primary target: node18-win-x64 (ESM support requires node18+)
Fallback target if node18 fails: node20-win-x64
node22-win-x64 is also valid but larger binary
Cross-compile targets (not tested): node18-win-arm64, node18-linux-x64, node18-macos-x64
_comment_esm: dist/cli.js is ESM (Bun target: bun, post-processed for Node.js compat).
dist/cli-node.js is the Node.js shebang wrapper: import './cli.js'
pkg must bundle dist/cli-node.js as the entry, NOT dist/cli.js directly,
because pkg resolves ESM re-exports correctly through the wrapper.
pkg entry is specified via CLI: pkg dist/cli-node.js --config packaging/pkg-config.json
_comment_assets: dist/**/* captures all ~450 chunk .js files alongside cli.js
vendor/audio-capture/*.node are the pre-built native audio capture addons
color-diff-napi and image-processor-napi ship as TypeScript source (no prebuilt .node),
so they are bundled into dist/cli.js by Bun at build time — no extra asset needed.
